where.if: AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ceo_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR business_reg_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clients (client_type, name, business_reg_no, corporate_reg_no, ceo_name, opened_date, business_type, business_item, industry, phone, homepage, email, zip_code, address, address_detail, region, status, bank_name, bank_account, bank_holder, bank_stamp, memo, attachment_path) VALUES (#{clientType}, #{name}, #{businessRegNo}, #{corporateRegNo}, #{ceoName}, #{openedDate}, #{businessType}, #{businessItem}, #{industry}, #{phone}, #{homepage}, #{email}, #{zipCode}, #{address}, #{addressDetail}, #{region}, #{status}, #{bankName}, #{bankAccount}, #{bankHolder}, #{bankStamp}, #{memo}, #{attachmentPath})
mapper.update: UPDATE clients SET client_type = #{clientType}, name = #{name}, business_reg_no = #{businessRegNo}, corporate_reg_no = #{corporateRegNo}, ceo_name = #{ceoName}, opened_date = #{openedDate}, business_type = #{businessType}, business_item = #{businessItem}, industry = #{industry}, phone = #{phone}, homepage = #{homepage}, email = #{email}, zip_code = #{zipCode}, address = #{address}, address_detail = #{addressDetail}, region = #{region}, status = #{status}, bank_name = #{bankName}, bank_account = #{bankAccount}, bank_holder = #{bankHolder}, bank_stamp = #{bankStamp}, memo = #{memo}, attachment_path = #{attachmentPath} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM clients WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM client_contacts WHERE client_id = #{clientId} ORDER BY is_primary DESC, sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO client_contacts (client_id, name, department, position, phone, email, is_primary, sort_order) VALUES (#{clientId}, #{name}, #{department}, #{position}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM client_contacts WHERE id = #{id} AND client_id = #{clientId}
